Hero.title: Discover Lombok & Bali
Hero.subtitle: Explore Indonesia with a local friend — pick your destinations and we'll craft an authentic, personalized journey just for you.

Mission.heading: Your Journey, Your Way
paragraphs: Lombok and Bali are more than destinations — they're feelings. The warmth of a sunrise over Mount Rinjani, the serenity of a hidden beach, the thrill of diving into crystal-clear waters.
We don't do cookie-cutter tours. Every itinerary we create is fully personalized — designed around where you want to go, how you want to feel, and who you're traveling with.
Whether you're a couple seeking a romantic escape, a family chasing adventure, or a solo traveler exploring the unknown — we craft every detail around you.

items.quote: The custom itinerary was absolutely perfect. Every detail was taken care of, from hidden waterfalls to sunset dinners on the beach.
items.name: Sarah

items.quote: Best family vacation we've ever had. The kids loved the snorkeling and the cultural experiences were unforgettable.
items.name: David

items.quote: From hidden temples to private beach picnics — this trip exceeded every expectation. Truly a dream come true.
items.name: Yuki

items.quote: We wanted something unique for our honeymoon and they delivered beyond imagination. Every moment felt magical.
items.name: Emma & James

Trips.heading: Explore Our Trips

items.text: Top Rated Tour Operator in Southeast Asia 2025
Best Custom Travel Experience in Indonesia

block1.heading:
What We Do
And Why We Do It
block1.body1: Bali and Lombok are more than breathtaking landscapes — they are living stories waiting to be told. At Pingintrip, we don't just show you the views. We craft luxury journeys that weave together culture, history, and the hidden narratives behind every destination.
block1.body2: From private temple ceremonies to sunset dinners on cliffside terraces, every moment is curated to be as rich in meaning as it is in beauty. This isn't sightseeing — it's storytelling through travel.

block2.heading:
Trusted
Since 2013
block2.body1: For over a decade, Pingintrip has been one of the largest and most trusted tour operators across Bali and Lombok. What started as a small team of passionate local guides has grown into a full-service travel company — but our heart remains the same.
block2.body2: Over 10,000 travelers from 40+ countries have explored Indonesia with us. We've built our reputation on reliability, personal attention, and an unwavering commitment to creating exceptional experiences.

block3.heading:
Beyond
The View
block3.body1: Beautiful scenery is just the beginning. We believe the most unforgettable travel moments come from what you do, not just what you see. That's why every Pingintrip itinerary includes immersive experiences — from traditional cooking classes to island treasure hunts and team challenges.
block3.body2: Whether it's friendly competitions at a hidden waterfall, cultural games with local communities, or a surprise adventure designed just for your group — we make sure you take home more than photos. You take home stories.

items.title: Trusted Since 2013
items.description: Over a decade as Lombok's largest tour operator — 10,000+ travelers, 40+ countries, one unwavering standard of excellence.

items.title: Local CEO Guides
items.description: Every journey is led by a Chief Experience Officer — a born-and-raised local expert who shares the soul of the islands, not just the sights.

items.title: Community First
items.description: We practice tourism that gives back. Every trip directly supports local families, preserves traditions, and protects the environment we love.

items.title: Beyond the Tourist Trail
items.description: We take you where guidebooks can't — hidden waterfalls, sacred ceremonies, secret beaches. The real Indonesia, not the postcard version.

Footer.tagline: Authentic journeys, real friendships, local soul. Since 2013.

AboutPage.heroTitle: Travel is better when you leave as friends
AboutPage.heroDesc: Since 2013, we've been crafting journeys across Indonesia that go beyond sightseeing — creating friendships, sharing stories, and building memories that truly last.
AboutPage.storyTitle: From local guide to your travel partner
AboutPage.storyP1: Pingintrip was born from a simple realization. As a local guide exploring every corner of Indonesia — from the volcanic peaks of Lombok to the hidden temples of Bali — our founder Reza noticed something missing from most trips.
AboutPage.storyP2: Tourists would visit beautiful places, take photos, and leave. But the most memorable trips? Those were the ones where travelers became friends, where every destination had a story, and where the journey felt personal — not packaged.
AboutPage.storyP3: That insight became our foundation: a great trip isn't about luxury. It's about connection, authenticity, and the stories you carry home.
AboutPage.philo1Desc: Every trip is designed to feel like exploring with a local friend, not following a tour guide with a flag. We believe the best travel memories are made through genuine human connections.
AboutPage.philo2Desc: Every destination we visit has a history worth knowing. We don't just show you the view — we share the stories, legends, and cultural context that make each place truly meaningful.
AboutPage.philo3Desc: No tourist traps, no overpriced detours. We take you to the places locals actually love, paired with authentic food, traditions, and encounters you won't find in any guidebook.
AboutPage.teamRezaBio: A local guide who has explored every destination Pingintrip offers. Reza's deep knowledge of Indonesian culture and his natural warmth with travelers are what make every trip feel like an adventure with a friend.
AboutPage.teamGalangBio: The engine behind the scenes. Galang ensures every itinerary runs smoothly — from logistics and partnerships to making sure you have the best local experience possible.
AboutPage.trustDesc: Over the years, some of Indonesia's leading companies have chosen Pingintrip to organize corporate retreats, team outings, and VIP experiences — a testament to our reliability and quality of service.
AboutPage.ctaDesc: Tell us where you want to go and we'll craft a journey that's uniquely yours — complete with local insights, hidden gems, and a friend to guide the way.

PrivacyPage.heroDesc: Your privacy matters to us. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information when you use our services.
PrivacyPage.ctaDesc: If you have any questions about how we handle your personal information, we're happy to help.

TermsPage.ctaDesc: If anything is unclear, we're happy to explain. Don't hesitate to reach out.

InsurancePage.heroDesc: Protect your trip with comprehensive travel insurance. Travel with peace of mind knowing you're covered.
InsurancePage.recommendation: We strongly recommend all travelers purchase comprehensive travel insurance before departure. It is required for adventure activities such as Mount Rinjani trekking and scuba diving.
InsurancePage.providersDesc: These are providers we trust based on our travelers' experiences. We are not affiliated with any of them.
InsurancePage.ctaDesc: Once you're covered, let's start building your dream trip to Indonesia.
